E0300_BHVR_PRSNT_CD E0300 Overall Presence of Behavioral Symptoms CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if any of the behavioral symptoms in E0200A-E0200C were coded as 1, 2 or 3. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern)
